words.example: The bone is strong. - L'os est fort.
Exercise builds muscle. - L'exercice construit du muscle.
The skeleton supports the body. - Le squelette supporte le corps.
The spine is flexible. - La colonne vertébrale est flexible.
The joint allows movement. - L'articulation permet le mouvement.
The tendon connects muscle to bone. - Le tendon relie le muscle à l'os.
